mapper.sql: id AS log_id, application_id, from_status, to_status, trigger_event, operator_type, operator_name, remark, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO state_transition_log (application_id, from_status, to_status, trigger_event, operator_type, operator_name, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{triggerEvent}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM state_transition_log WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at, id
